room_communications.message: Nella Sorn looks toward the floor grating. "Prior Oren barred the kiln flue. The reader and kiln tender cut the bell wire when I tried to call Greybank. If you go below, do not breathe deep."

keyword_actions.message: Nella says, "We wash and wrap Greybank's dead, then burn the stained cloth and spoiled ward wax. Oren fed green grave wax into the lower kiln. It burns hot, but the smoke turns the head and fouls every seal above it."

room_communications.message: A layworker coughs into a strip of wet linen, then snatches up a trimming knife with both hands.
The chapel reader pulls once at the bound handbell, hears no sound, and advances with a wax knife raised.
A burial hand turns from the softened niche seals, face streaked with soot, and plants a trimming knife between you and the east passage.
The kiln tender drags a long iron rake from the spoiled ash and lowers its hooked end toward your knees.
Oren Saye braces an iron kiln rake across the stair. "The smoke keeps the old seals fed. Open that flue and Greybank inherits what is buried here."
Sergeant Halda Brakk taps the slate beside her. "If you need another pair of hands, ask me about recruits."

enlist: Tarn Rusk checks the knot on his sword belt. "I take the left side. You call the pace."
Tarn Rusk tests his blade in its sheath. "Ready when you are."
dismiss: "I will be at the muster fire," Tarn Rusk says. "Ask if the road turns bad."
victory: Tarn Rusk wipes his blade on a scrap of sacking and looks to the road ahead.
"Everyone whole?" Tarn Rusk asks before sheathing his sword.
Tarn Rusk checks the fallen for anything still moving.

enlist: Bram Keld settles the bronze-bound cudgel across one shoulder. "Stay behind me when the line closes."
dismiss: Bram Keld sets his cudgel beside the muster bench. "I will keep my place by the wall."
victory: Bram Keld looks over the others for wounds before lowering his cudgel.

enlist: Ora Pell closes her satchel and falls in beside you. "Show me the wound before it becomes a problem."
dismiss: Ora Pell returns her shears to the satchel. "Boil the bandages before you need them."
victory: Ora Pell checks the fallen, then reaches for a roll of linen.
"If you are bleeding, hold still," Ora Pell says, already opening her satchel.

room_communications.message: Maela Dorr lowers the hook of her axe across the stair. "Back down. Last warning."
Varo Kesh takes a clay pot from beside the signal brazier and thumbs off its wax stopper.
Seln Varr rises behind the crenels, draws one knife, and leaves the other hand near his belt.
Brother Edran touches the cracked icon above the shield pegs, then lifts his maul. "You have no place here."
Hadrik Voss looks once toward each silent tower, then draws his greatsword. "You have taken the walls. You still have to take them from me."
Aurek puts one hand on his sabre. "Leave the command room. I will not warn you again."
Aurek taps the empty hook beside his map. "The loft key is already afield. I can do nothing until it returns."
Aurek looks up from a road map and touches two fingers to his breastplate. "Greybank still teaches a proper bow, I hope. Return one, and we can speak."
Aurek waits beside the map table. "The bow first, traveller. Then we can speak."
Aurek bends over his road map again.

keyword_actions.message: Aurek draws his sabre. "No parley. Leave or defend yourself."
Aurek bends over his road map again.
Aurek taps the empty hook beside his map. "The loft key is already afield. I can do nothing until it returns."
Aurek touches two fingers to his breastplate. "Courtesy first. Bow, and we will speak."
Aurek returns the bow and gives you a bronze key. "We found this in the lower masonry. It fits the old chest in Greybank's gatehouse loft."
keyword_actions.already_message: Aurek says, "The key is already in your keeping."

room_communications.message: Samiel rests a hand on his sabre. "Leave the prayer walk. I will not warn you again."
Samiel keeps his voice low. "Merovech, our old vault keeper, has broken the reliquary seals south of here. Kill him and return."
Samiel glances toward the quiet vault. "Kneel at the broken sun and speak absolution. The lower tomb should open. Bring me its key."
Samiel is fitting a new bronze seal to the prayer walk.

keyword_actions.message: Samiel draws his sabre. "There is nothing left to discuss."
Samiel says, "Merovech, our old vault keeper, is in the reliquary south of here. Kill him before he breaks another seal."
Samiel says, "Kneel at the broken sun and speak absolution. The lower tomb should open. Bring me its key."

Samiel receives the sepulcher key with both hands. "Good. I can set the lower seals again."
You gain 450 experience.
keyword_actions.already_message: Samiel says, "The key is already where it belongs."

keyword_actions.message: Samiel says, "The key is in the lower tomb. I cannot reset the seals without it."
Samiel says, "The lower seals will hold. Go safely."
